command: ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | grep -i 'debug\|bundle\|trace\|auth\|token' | head -200

printf 'SOUL.md\nUSER.md\n'; for f in SOUL.md USER.md; do echo "--- $f ---"; sed -n '1,200p' "$f"; done; d=$(date -u +%F); y=$(date -u -d 'yesterday' +%F 2>/dev/null || python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
print((datetime.now(timezone.utc)-timedelta(days=1)).date())
PY
); for f in "memory/$d.md" "memory/$y.md"; do [ -f "$f" ] && { echo "--- $f ---"; sed -n '1,200p' "$f"; }; done
